title: Custom email banner centered on a left-aligned email

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
While setting up monday.com I saw the the custom email banner field and created a banner.

I’ve just seen the banner for the first time in an actual email and it’s centered.
The content of the email isn’t centered, but the banner is.

On a 4k monitor this looks ridiculous.

Is there a way to change this? Can monday.com just change it now in anticipation of more people using larger monitors?
